meta.summary: ClipKIT 2.12.0 alignment trimming software for phylogenetics and phylogenomics.
meta.description: ClipKIT 2.12.0 alignment trimming software for phylogenetics and phylogenomics.

test: clipkit --version | grep -Fx 'clipkit 2.12.0' >/dev/null && clipkit --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: clipkit <input>' >/dev/null && clipkit --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'smart-gap' >/dev/null && python -c 'import Bio, clipkit, numpy, zstandard; from clipkit.version import __version__; assert __version__ == "2.12.0"' && grep -F 'source_sha256=e6fa1aa08bff0bf3962c38622ac3193dc9fd7c7adb4341058b34288e97c9ce80' /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'ecomp_sha256=f9f9b2a1084757586a797708a5198156347164516393462a04a5cd624d568065' /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/source.txt >/dev/null && find /opt/clipkit/venv -type f -name '*.so' -print0 | xargs -0 -r ldd > /tmp/taf-clipkit-ldd.txt && ! grep -F 'not found' /tmp/taf-clipkit-ldd.txt >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-clipkit-trim-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>s1
ACGTACGT
>s2
ACGTA-GT
>s3
ACGTA-GT
>s4
ACGTA-GT
' > in.fa && clipkit in.fa -m gappy -g 0.5 -o out.fa -of fasta -l -c --report_json report.json --plot_trim_report report.html > run.log 2>&1 && test -s out.fa && test -s out.fa.log && test -s out.fa.complement && test -s report.json && test -s report.html && grep -F '>s1' out.fa >/dev/null && grep -F 'Trimmed alignment: out.fa' run.log >/dev/null && python -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("report.json")); assert data["status"] == "completed"; assert data["mode"] == "gappy"' && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-clipkit-validate-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>s1
ACGTACGTACGT
>s2
ACGTACGTACGT
>s3
ACGTA-GTACGT
' > in.fa && clipkit in.fa --validate_only --report_json validate.json > validate.log 2>&1 && test -s validate.json && grep -F 'Validation successful' validate.log >/dev/null && python -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("validate.json")); assert data["status"] == "validated"; assert data["validate_only"] is True' && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-clipkit-ecomp-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; cp /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/test.ecomp in.ecomp && clipkit in.ecomp -o out.fa -of fasta --report_json ecomp.json -q && test -s out.fa && test -s ecomp.json && python -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("ecomp.json")); assert data["status"] == "completed"; assert data["output_file_format"] == "fasta"' && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: ClipKIT
upstream.citation: Steenwyk et al. 2020, ClipKIT: a multiple sequence alignment trimming software for accurate phylogenomic inference

meta.summary: Alignment trimming software for phylogenetics and phylogenomics.
meta.description: Alignment trimming software for phylogenetics and phylogenomics.

test: clipkit --version | grep -Fx 'clipkit 2.12.2' >/dev/null && clipkit --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: clipkit <input>' >/dev/null && clipkit --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'smart-gap' >/dev/null && python -c 'import Bio, clipkit, numpy, zstandard; from clipkit.version import __version__; assert __version__ == "2.12.2"' && grep -F 'commit=fa656cb6532aa3fb4c22ecef3b44721c658e283d' /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'wheel_sha256=b9074ba75ef0a1217b2c4c7aed36ca927c3664117d59f28a9844cc539c6c0630' /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'source_sha256=bdc1e7f0d8da34e8a8622715de7203edf51da47d8163cc78799b923a7be0e2b4' /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/source.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'ecomp_sha256=f9f9b2a1084757586a797708a5198156347164516393462a04a5cd624d568065' /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/source.txt >/dev/null && find /opt/clipkit/venv -type f -name '*.so' -print0 | xargs -0 -r ldd > /tmp/taf-clipkit-ldd.txt && ! grep -F 'not found' /tmp/taf-clipkit-ldd.txt >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-clipkit-trim-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>s1
ACGTACGT
>s2
ACGTA-GT
>s3
ACGTA-GT
>s4
ACGTA-GT
' > in.fa && clipkit in.fa -m gappy -g 0.5 -o out.fa -of fasta -l -c --report_json report.json --plot_trim_report report.html > run.log 2>&1 && test -s out.fa && test -s out.fa.log && test -s out.fa.complement && test -s report.json && test -s report.html && grep -F '>s1' out.fa >/dev/null && grep -F 'Trimmed alignment: out.fa' run.log >/dev/null && python -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("report.json")); assert data["status"] == "completed"; assert data["mode"] == "gappy"' && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-clipkit-validate-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; printf '>s1
ACGTACGTACGT
>s2
ACGTACGTACGT
>s3
ACGTA-GTACGT
' > in.fa && clipkit in.fa --validate_only --report_json validate.json > validate.log 2>&1 && test -s validate.json && grep -F 'Validation successful' validate.log >/dev/null && python -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("validate.json")); assert data["status"] == "validated"; assert data["validate_only"] is True' && rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-clipkit-ecomp-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; cd "$tmp"; cp /opt/clipkit/share/doc/clipkit/test.ecomp in.ecomp && clipkit in.ecomp -o out.fa -of fasta --report_json ecomp.json -q && test -s out.fa && test -s ecomp.json && python -c 'import json; data=json.load(open("ecomp.json")); assert data["status"] == "completed"; assert data["output_file_format"] == "fasta"' && rm -rf "$tmp"

python -c 'import numpy as np; from clipkit.msa import MSA; n=1024; records=np.full((n,n), "A", dtype="U1"); records[:512,0]="-"; records[512:768,0]="C"; msa=MSA([{"id":str(i)} for i in range(n)], records, gap_chars=["-"]); assert records.size > 1000000; assert msa.site_gappyness[0] == 0.5; assert msa.site_entropy[0] == 1.0; assert msa.site_composition_bias[0] == 0.0; assert msa.column_character_frequencies[0] == {"A":256, "C":256}'

upstream.name: ClipKIT
upstream.citation: Steenwyk et al. 2020, ClipKIT: a multiple sequence alignment trimming software for accurate phylogenomic inference
